final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: brand poster
Asset type: marketing poster, social media asset
Primary request: elegant autumn-themed brand poster featuring "RAN QIU" logo with natural elements
Scene/backdrop: serene autumn landscape with abundant negative space, soft golden hour meadow, gentle falling leaves, distant misty mountains
Subject: "RAN QIU" brand logo prominently displayed, surrounded by poetic natural elements like dried grass, autumn leaves, subtle botanical accents
Style/medium: editorial photography aesthetic, oriental minimalism, poetic and serene visual language
Composition/framing: generous white space, shallow depth of field, balanced asymmetrical layout, logo as focal point
Lighting/mood: golden hour warm light, soft diffused glow, warm and healing atmosphere, tranquil and contemplative mood
Color palette: #8B3A1E deep autumn brown-red, #E8DCCB warm beige, #D4A574 golden brown, warm earthy tones with golden highlights
Materials/textures: natural paper texture, matte finish, organic botanical elements, soft fabric-like background
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: maintain brand color palette #8B3A1E #E8DCCB #D4A574, preserve oriental minimalist aesthetic, ensure logo legibility, keep abundant negative space
Avoid: cluttered composition, cold tones, harsh lighting, oversaturated colors, busy patterns, modern tech elements
